ingress.description: Injected by ApplicationSet — not used by this chart

managementPolicies.description: Should records be observed or controlled. (Zones are always observe only.)

deletionPolicy.description: Should records be deleted or left orphan if a record is removed or chart is uninstalled?

tables.description: Specify tables to be created. Each entry defines a DynamoDB table and its attributes.

pointInTimeRecovery.description: Enable point in time recovery for the table. (Allow recovery enable restore to any point in time in the last 35 days.)

name.description: Name of the table. The namespace will be prefixed when rendered (e.g., <namespace>-<name>).

hashKey.description: Name of the hash (partition) key. Must also be defined in the attributes array.

rangeKey.description: Name of the range (sort) key, if any. Must also be defined in the attributes array.

readCapacity.description: Read capacity - only meaningful when billingMode is PROVISIONED

writeCapacity.description: Write capacity - only meaningful when billingMode is PROVISIONED

billingMode.description: Billing mode for the table. Can be either PAY_PER_REQUEST or PROVISIONED. If PROVISIONED you must also specify readCapacity and writeCapacity.

region.description: Optional. If set it must point to a valid AWS region.

attributes.description: Complete set of attribute definitions for the table (at least those used as keys).

useIdpPrefix.description: If enabled the table name will get prefixed with 'idp-' in addition to the namespace. Only for legacy purposes; you should usually omit this settings.

serviceAccountWriteRoles.description: List of existing IAM Role names to which this chart will attach the generated write policies for this table.

serviceAccountReadRoles.description: List of existing IAM Role names to which this chart will attach the generated read policies for this table.

ttl.description: Setup of ttl for the records. Each element must consist of 'attributeName' (a string) and the boolean 'enabled'.

attributeName.description: Name of attribute to use for ttl.

enabled.description: Whether ttl should be enabled or not.

globalSecondaryIndex.description: A list of global secondary indexes to create for the table.

nonKeyAttributes.description: An array of strings defining the attributes to include in the index for faster retrieval.

projectionType.description: Defines lookup. KEYS_ONLY will require additional reads but require least storage. Using 'INCLUDE' requires elements in 'nonKeyAttributes'.

readCapacity.description: Read capacity - only meaningful when billingMode is PROVISIONED

writeCapacity.description: Write capacity - only meaningful when billingMode is PROVISIONED

localSecondaryIndex.description: List of Local Secondary Indexes to create for the table.

rangeKey.description: Range key for sorting (the alternate sort key used by the LSI).

projectionType.description: Defines how the index handles non-index attributes. Possible values are 'KEYS_ONLY', 'INCLUDE' and 'ALL'.

nonKeyAttributes.description: An array of strings defining the attributes to include in the index for faster retrieval.
